Home → Piraeus → Phidias Hotel

Phidias Hotel

★★★☆☆
from €75 /night
Check Availability

Overview

Simple hotel walking distance from Piraeus port. Ideal for catching early ferries.

Who Should Consider Phidias Hotel

Phidias Hotel is a 3-star budget price-signal hotel in Piraeus, with no Acropolis-view signal in the current dataset and no rooftop-bar signal in the current dataset. It is tagged for ferry travelers, budget, practical.

  • Compare the area on the Piraeus hotel guide.
  • See broader criteria-based picks in Best Hotels in Athens.
  • For rooftop stays, compare Athens rooftop bar hotels.

Amenities

BreakfastWiFiAC

✓ Pros

  • Very close to port
  • Affordable
  • Clean

✗ Cons

  • Basic rooms
  • Not scenic

Location

Located in Piraeus, 30 min (metro) walk to the Acropolis.

🏛️ 30 min (metro) to Acropolis
🚇 5-10 min to metro

Quick Facts

  • Neighborhood: Piraeus
  • Star Rating: 3 stars
  • Price Range: €60-113
  • Acropolis View: No
  • Rooftop Bar: No
